meaning: n.美国COMPAQ电脑公司 美国康柏公司,世界著名的电脑生产厂家。
examples: Two years later, when Compaq went public, their stock was valued at $38 million.
Even the mighty Compaq is emulating Dell by building some machines to order.
Merging with Compaq, she said, would enable HP to reach its goals faster than it could on its own.
But how would Compaq survive if one of five of the computers it brought to the marketplace succeeded?
Compaq, using Dell-inspired quick inventory turns, still manages to eke out a profit in PCs.
